revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-1-030

A boat used for :

*carrying out repairs and maintenance to fixed aids to navigation

*handling smaller buoys

*relief of personnel and fuelling and provisioning of lighthouses and light vessels.


Note : 

No special term exists for this in German, but the general term Seezeichenfahrzeug includes work barges used by the lighthouse services (See note to 8-1-000).

{{IALAFooter}}
